'''lavoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huauzontle|huauzontle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huauzontle|huauzontle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lavoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læveheth|læveheth]] || [[word:lævehej|lævehej]] || [[word:lævehesh|lævehesh]] || [[word:lævehe|lævehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lavovohoth|lavovohoth]] || [[word:lavovohoj|lavovohoj]] || [[word:lavovohosh|lavovohosh]] || [[word:lavovoho|lavovoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lavohoth|lavohoth]] || [[word:lavohoj|lavohoj]] || [[word:lavohosh|lavohosh]] || [[word:lavoho|lavoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lavofhofth|lavofhofth]] || [[word:lavofhofj|lavofhofj]] || [[word:lavofhofsh|lavofhofsh]] || [[word:lavofhof|lavofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lavohotho|lavohotho]] || [[word:lavohojo|lavohojo]] || [[word:lavohosho|lavohosho]] || [[word:lavohoko|lavohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lavohoth|lavohoth]] || [[word:lavohoj|lavohoj]] || [[word:lavohosh|lavohosh]] || [[word:lavoho|lavoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lavohothol|lavohothol]] || [[word:lavohojol|lavohojol]] || [[word:lavohoshol|lavohoshol]] || [[word:lavohokol|lavohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lavohoothotho|lavohoothotho]] || [[word:lavohoojojo|lavohoojojo]] || [[word:lavohooshosho|lavohooshosho]] || [[word:lavohooko|lavohooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lavohothon|lavohothon]] || [[word:lavohojon|lavohojon]] || [[word:lavohoshon|lavohoshon]] || [[word:lavohokon|lavohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lavohothooro|lavohothooro]] || [[word:lavohojooro|lavohojooro]] || [[word:lavohoshooro|lavohoshooro]] || [[word:lavohokooro|lavohokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
